# wake remove

Remove an installed schedule

## Flags

| Name | Short | Type | Default | Env | Description |
|------|-------|------|---------|-----|-------------|
| `--dry-run` |  | bool |  |  | Show what would be stopped and deleted |

## Arguments

| Name | Required | Description |
|------|----------|-------------|
| `name` | yes | Schedule name |
